description_long: This humanoid robot features a skeletal, mechanical frame with exposed joints and components, giving it a rugged, industrial appearance. Its torso is composed of stacked, circular segments, and it has long, thin limbs with visible wiring and mechanical parts. The head is small and round, with what appears to be a single, prominent sensor or eye, and a large, disc-like structure is attached to the upper back or shoulder area. The robot's hands and feet are angular and mechanical, with some parts appearing fragmented or loosely attached. Scattered debris or fragments surround the robot, suggesting either damage or a modular construction. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on function over aesthetics, and the robot appears to be built primarily from metal and synthetic materials.
description: A skeletal, industrial humanoid robot with exposed joints, a segmented torso, and a disc-like structure on its back. The design is rugged, with visible wiring and mechanical limbs.
description_view_0: The robot is seen from above, highlighting the disc-like structure on its back and the fragmented, skeletal arrangement of its limbs.
description_view_1: A three-quarter view reveals the segmented torso, angular limbs, and the prominent disc on the upper back, with more detail visible in the arm and leg construction.
description_view_2: The rear view emphasizes the stacked torso segments, thin mechanical limbs, and the overall skeletal structure, with the disc and wiring more visible.
description_view_3: A side/rear angle shows the robot's fragmented lower limbs, the disc structure, and the scattered debris or modular parts around its feet.
attribute_pose: The robot is upright with one arm raised and the other lowered, legs slightly apart, and the head facing forward. The torso is straight, and the disc structure is attached to the upper back.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, with only integrated mechanical panels and exposed components visible.
attribute_facial_features: The face is minimalistic, featuring a small, round head with a single prominent sensor or eye and no visible mouth or nose.
attribute_limb_articulation: The robot has articulated arms and legs with visible hinge and rotary joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees. The limbs appear to have a moderate range of motion and are constructed from rigid segments.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: A single prominent sensor or camera is visible on the head; no other sensors are clearly visible.
